## Summary of Tests Run in Section 3

### 1. Base Temperature Optimization Tests

| Test | Purpose | Method | Variables Tested |
|------|---------|--------|------------------|
| **Base temperature grid search** | Find optimal BASE_TEMP for thermal aggregates | Loop over 0-10°C, minimize AIC | `sum_heat_noncrit`, `sum_cold_noncrit` |
| **Phase-specific base comparison** | Test if early/late halves need different base temps | Compare AIC/BIC of m3 vs m3_opt | Early half vs late half aggregates |

---

### 2. Hypothesis Tests (H₁–H₄)

| Hypothesis | Test | What It Tests | Null Hypothesis |
|------------|------|---------------|-----------------|
| **H₁a** | t-test | `days_hot_crit` coefficient | β ≥ 0 (no negative effect) |
| **H₁b** | t-test | `days_cold_crit` coefficient | β ≥ 0 (no negative effect) |
| **H₁c** | t-test | `sum_heat_noncrit` coefficient | β ≤ 0 (no positive effect) |
| **H₁d** | t-test | `sum_cold_noncrit` coefficient | β ≤ 0 (no positive effect) |
| **H₂** | AIC/BIC comparison | M2b (growing season) vs M2a (full year) | Growing season model not better |
| **H₃** | Wald test | Equality of early vs late half coefficients | β_early = β_late for all weather variables |
| **H₄** | VIF | Collinearity of `total_radiation` and `total_et0` | VIF ≤ 10 |

---

### 3. Soil Variable Tests

| Test | Purpose | Method | What It Reveals |
|------|---------|--------|-----------------|
| **Random effects model** | Test direct significance of soil properties | `lmer()` with (1\|region) + (1\|year) | Which soil variables (pH, organic_matter, clay, etc.) significantly affect yield |
| **Soil × weather interactions** | Test if soil moderates weather effects | FE model with interaction terms | Whether organic matter or clay buffer heat/drought stress |

---

### 4. Variable Importance Test

| Test | Purpose | Method | Output |
|------|---------|--------|--------|
| **Standardised coefficients** | Compare effect sizes across different units | Scale all continuous variables, run FE model | Ranked list of factors by absolute impact on yield |

---

### 5. Model Fit Comparisons

| Comparison | Models Compared | Criteria |
|------------|-----------------|----------|
| **Base temperature** | Same model with different BASE_TEMP values | AIC, BIC, Within-R² |
| **Phase-specific base** | m3 (BASE_TEMP=5) vs m3_opt (phase-specific optimal) | AIC, BIC, Within-R² |
| **H₂ test** | M2a (full-year) vs M2b (growing season) | AIC, BIC, Within-R² |
| **Overall model fit** | M1, M1-log, M2a, M2b, M3 | AIC, BIC, R² (within & overall) |

---

### 6. Joint Significance Tests

| Test | Purpose | Variables Included |
|------|---------|-------------------|
| **Wald F-test (Model 1)** | Test if ALL weather variables jointly matter | `days_hot_crit`, `days_cold_crit`, `sum_heat_noncrit`, `sum_cold_noncrit`, `total_precip`, `total_et0`, `mean_wind`, `water_deficit` |

---

### Quick Reference Table

| # | Test Name | Section | Key Output |
|---|-----------|---------|-------------|
| 1 | Base temperature grid search | 3.1.1 | Optimal BASE_TEMP per phase |
| 2 | Phase-specific base comparison | 3.2 | AIC comparison table |
| 3 | Random effects (soil) | 3.3.1 | Soil coefficient p-values |
| 4 | Soil × weather interactions | 3.3.2 | Interaction coefficient table |
| 5 | Standardised coefficients | 3.4 | Variable importance ranking + plot |
| 6 | Wald test (H₃) | 3.8.5 | p-value for β_early = β_late |
| 7 | AIC/BIC comparison (H₂) | 3.9.1 | Fit table: M2a vs M2b |
| 8 | VIF (H₄) | Section 2.4 (earlier) | VIF values > 10 |

---

### What Each Test Tells You

| If test result is... | Then... |
|----------------------|---------|
| Optimal base temp differs by phase | Use different BASE_TEMP for early vs late half |
| Soil coefficient p < 0.05 | That soil property directly affects yield |
| Soil × weather interaction p < 0.05 | Soil moderates weather impact (e.g., clay buffers drought) |
| Water deficit has largest std coefficient | Water scarcity is #1 yield determinant |
| Wald test p < 0.05 (H₃) | Timing of weather stress matters (reject equality) |
| AIC(M2b) < AIC(M2a) | Winter weather matters (H₂ confirmed) |
| VIF > 10 for radiation | Omit radiation, keep ET₀ (H₄ confirmed) |
